Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlParserBaseVisitor<T>

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T>
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlParserBaseVisitor<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
JmlParserVisitor<T>, ParseTreeVisitor<T>
public class JmlParserBaseVisitor<T> extends AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T> implements JmlParserVisitor<T>
This class provides an empty implementation of JmlParserVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
